title: Dashboard
welcome: Welcome back, {{name}}. Here is how your brand is performing across AI engines.
noProject: Welcome! Start by creating a project
noProjectHint: Projects let you track how your brand appears across AI engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity. Create your first one to get started.
noMetricsHint: Run your first visibility scan to see how your brand performs across AI engines.

scoreTrend.title: Visibility Over Time
scoreTrend.subtitle: Total score trend across analysis runs
scoreTrend.noData: Not enough data for a trend chart yet. Run at least two scans.

engineBreakdown.title: Per-Engine Breakdown
engineBreakdown.subtitle: How your brand scores across each AI engine

traffic.title: Website Traffic
traffic.subtitle: Data from Google Analytics and Yandex Metrica
traffic.noDataHint: Connect Google Analytics or Yandex Metrica in Settings > Integrations

recentActivity.title: Recent Activity
recentActivity.subtitle: Latest updates for the selected project
recentActivity.emptyHint: Activity will appear here as you run queries and publish content.
recentActivity.visibilityImproved: Your overall AI visibility improved by {{points}} points this week
recentActivity.citationPosition: Your brand was mentioned in position #{{position}}
recentActivity.contentTracking: Blog post is now live and being tracked across {{count}} engines

assistantInsight.title: AI insight
assistantInsight.empty: Complete at least one analysis run to see an executive summary here.
assistantInsight.errorLimit: Usage limit reached. Try again later.
assistantInsight.errorNoKey: No AI API key configured for your workspace.

windowSparklines.title: Score & SoV across recent runs
windowSparklines.subtitle: Up to 7 completed runs in the selected window ({{period}})

analyticsProject.label: Project
analyticsProject.empty: Create a project to load analytics from your workspace.

competitors.title: Market Share Dynamics
competitors.subtitle: Live Real-Time Index · {{period}}
competitors.emptyCompetitors: No competitor data for this period yet.

citations.inDevelopmentBody: This section is not ready yet. We are building citation insights here — check back soon.

platforms.emptyEngines: No engine scores for this project yet.
platforms.noQueriesYet: No queries for this engine yet.

assistant.suggested1: How visible is my brand on ChatGPT?
assistant.suggested3: What topics am I missing from AI responses?
assistant.suggested4: Show sentiment trends for last 30 days
assistant.welcome: Hello! I'm your AI visibility intelligence assistant. Ask about this project's presence across AI engines, citations, and competitors.
assistant.footer: Model: project assistant API · Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
